scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @seshat/web && npm run build --workspace @seshat/worker
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @seshat/core && npm run build --workspace @seshat/zotero && npm run build --workspace @seshat/catalog
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test:packages && npm run test:python
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
